details.test: Task 1: Download largest file in standard quality from My Files
Task 2: Move large PDF files into new Project Backup folder
Task 3: Create protected 30-day share link for Client-Assets folder
Task 4: Add top PDF eBooks to Reading List collection
Task 5: Update download preferences to ask location and limit speed
Task 6: Add three files to high-priority download queue
Task 7: Permanently delete oldest large files from Trash
Task 8: Restore specific version of Report-Q1.pdf and download original
Task 9: Create Team Shared workspace with subfolders and editor permissions
